blended.narrative: Tremblant is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,121 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
